_title: ISO 7200:2004 — Technical product documentation — Data fields in title blocks and document headers
scope: Data fields in title blocks + document headers for technical product documentation. Distinguishes mandatory (4 fields) from optional (12 recommended fields).

structure.clause3: Definitions (title block, identification zone, data field)
